pr.title: Record: 9L MLP3x Full Stack + Custom Kernel Pipeline, val_bpb=1.1401

output.summary: 9-layer 512d transformer stacks GQA, NTK-RoPE, SmearGate/BigramHash, MLP 3x, muon+SWA, int6+zstd compression, and custom kernels for efficient sliding-window eval.
techniques: GQA + NTK-RoPE with SmearGate/BigramHash token features
Muon optimizer warmup schedule with SWA warmdown averaging
Int6 + zstd-22 compression alongside Triton/CUDA kernel fusion
